misc.title: 【ご報告】 26年4月期、週刊少年ジャンプ編集部は99名の新人作家さんに『研究生専属契約』を結んでいただきました 研究生の方限定で今期は #呪術廻戦 芥見下々先生の勉強講演会も実施予定です 今後とも新人漫画家皆様の漫画制作の一助となるよう制度と企画を実施してまいります

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Just saying, but I agree with people and the Galley Giant Pirate theory. Maybe it was the real Ragnir from first world who frozen them? And only current Ragnir can lift the ice? The fact
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Just saying, but I agree with people and the Galley Giant Pirate theory. Maybe it was the real Ragnir from first world who frozen them? And only current Ragnir can lift the ice? The fact that Oda is mentioned so randomly in the chapter is a big hint for me. WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1179 Loki and Luffy are searching for food together, and Loki mentions that the ice created by Ragnir can only be dissolved by Ragnir himself, otherwise it will exist forever. — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2039389639694295192#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1179 Rest of the Gorosei: "Imu-sama you must not go, we will go!" Imu: "Silence, a man here killed Harald, Rocks' equal!" Garling: "Err...d-d-did you just say Rocks? Uhh, hey guys, we shouldn
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1179 Rest of the Gorosei: "Imu-sama you must not go, we will go!" Imu: "Silence, a man here killed Harald, Rocks' equal!" Garling: "Err...d-d-did you just say Rocks? Uhh, hey guys, we shouldn't go, let's just let Imu go..." Bro got PTSD and didnt wanna pull up 😭🙏 WorstGenHQ (@WorstGenHQ) #ONEPIECE1179 The Gorosei really tried everything to prevent Imu from leaving alone; ONLY Garling was the only one who stopped the others and said that "The Great One" could do whatever he wanted and should leave because no one could stop him.... — https://nitter.net/WorstGenHQ/status/2039256307308409300#m

misc.title: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, i
misc.text: People are saying it’s fake… but just look at this. This is the leaked provisional poster from MAPPA that’s been going around, and I’m showing it right here. Also, if you look closely at the bottom, it kinda looks like it says “March 29”… 👀 I don’t know, judge for yourselves, but this feels off in a real way. 🩸⚔️ Daily Berserk 𒉭 (@daily_berserk) Berserk is finally getting a new anime adaptation by MAPPA 😳🔥 The announcement dropped just 1 hour ago, and fans are already losing their minds. After all these years… Guts is coming back in the way he deserves. 🩸⚔️ Are we ready for this? — https://nitter.net/daily_berserk/status/2039053928663253083#m
